verifyContract.title: Verify Contract
verifyContract.description: Submit contract source code to Magi Blocks to verify that the resulting compiled bytecode matches the deployed contract bytecode.

notice.languageBody: The contract verifier supports contracts written in Go only.
notice.compilerOptionsBody: There is currently no way to set custom compiler options yet. The verifier uses -gc=custom -scheduler=none -panic=trap -no-debug -target=wasm-unknown for Go contracts.
notice.environmentBody: Contracts are compiled using the official TinyGo Docker image.
notice.entrypointBody: The default entrypoint directory is contract/ for Go contracts. A custom subdirectory may be specified if the contract source code is located elsewhere in the repository. Please ensure that main.go exists as part of the main package in the specified directory.
notice.dependenciesBody: The contract verifier does not support importing external packages outside of Go standard library for now.
notice.experimentalBody: This tool is currently experimental and some issues are to be expected. It is only available for whitelisted users for now.

form.contractDirTip: Subdirectory containing the contract source code to compile, relative to the Go module directory. Defaults to "contract".
form.goModDirTip: Subdirectory containing the go.mod file, if it is not in the repository root. Leave empty if go.mod is at the root.

errors.mustBeGithub: Repository URL must be a GitHub link
errors.alreadyVerified: Contract is already verified or being verified.
errors.backendError: Failed to call backend for contract verification status
errors.repoFetchError: Failed to fetch repository info with status code {{statusCode}}
errors.branchFetchError: Failed to fetch branch info with status code {{statusCode}}

verifyContract.approveSignature: Approve message signature request in wallet when prompted
verifyContract.completionMsg: Your contract source code is being verified. This may take a few minutes depending on the queue. Refer to the Source Code tab in contract page for status.

dagInspector.title: DAG Inspector
dagInspector.description: View the contents of a DAG by CID pinned by nodes.

broadcast.title: Broadcast Transaction
broadcast.description: Sign and broadcast a Magi transaction.
broadcast.destPlaceholder: Include hive: or did: prefix for non-map, defaults to sender

errors.depositAsset: Deposit asset must be HIVE or HBD.
errors.hiveWalletOnly: Can only map from Hive wallets.
